name: Soulforge Aptitude
descriptionTemplate:
This talent is only effective in the {Astral Reign} stages.
This Awakener's CON, ATK, and DEF +[Arg1]%, and they gain [Arg2] Keyflare upon their first {Rouse}.
{Song of Saya} grants the selected Awakener [Arg3] stacks of {Propagation Frenzy} and makes the next Posse take effect twice.
Saya inflicts +[Arg4]% {Corrosion} stacks on {Caro} enemies.
